title: WhiteHat Jr is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: WhiteHat Jr is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
WhiteHat Jr, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Thane operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About WhiteHat Jr:
WhiteHat Jr is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WhiteHat Jr!
